response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is heavily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile apps with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric systems design.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks clear experience building or leading cloud compute platforms or distributed systems
Minimal evidence of software architecture or technical leadership in cloud infrastructure contexts
